response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent assertions), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile-platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and infrastructure automation
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) beyond one project
Lacks mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
